description: [``botocore``] Scheduled email reports of Billing and Cost Management Dashboards
[``botocore``] Introducing support for SearchRegistryRecords API on AgentCoreRegistry
[``botocore``] Initial release for CRUDL in AgentCore Registry Service
[``botocore``] Adds support for MediaLive Channel-type Router Inputs.

[``botocore``] The BatchExecuteStatement API now supports named SQL parameters, enabling secure batch queries with parameterized values. This enhancement helps prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities and improves query reusability.
[``botocore``] Release support for g7e instance types for SageMaker HyperPod
